pi_items.source: Task description strictly requires creating 'Campaign ID: FASTTRACK'. Setup script (setup_task.sh) also explicitly deletes this specific campaign to ensure a clean state.
Task description strictly requires creating 'Status: DISPTO'. Setup script (setup_task.sh) also explicitly deletes this specific status to ensure a clean state.
Task description explicitly requires setting 'Dispo Screen Time Limit' to 30 seconds. Verifier script checks for '30'.
Task description explicitly requires setting 'Wrapup Seconds' to 5. Verifier script checks for '5'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring a synthetically generated Vicidial campaign. The target campaign ID is strictly 'FASTTRACK' and the target custom status ID is 'DISPTO', as explicitly defined in the task instructions and confirmed by the setup script deleting these specific entries beforehand to ensure a clean state. The disposition screen time limit must be set to 30 seconds and the wrapup time must be 5 seconds, exactly matching the explicit task instructions.
